hero.description: With over a decade of expertise and international certifications, TNO is committed to safety and quality — protecting every voyage.

services.title: Our Professional Services
services.description1: From interior design to component manufacturing, we support every stage of ship construction and maintenance,
services.description2: delivering comprehensive solutions that ensure navigational safety and onboard comfort.

material.title: Material Agency
material.description: Supplying certified insulation, foam, and timber — keeping every build on schedule

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: From metal panels to stainless steel kitchens — durable, precision-made marine components

design.title: Design & Planning
design.description: 2D/3D planning with professional design workflows to ensure every detail works

processing.title: Custom Fabrication
processing.description: Precision machining, bending, and welding — reliable components for any spec

products.title: Featured Products
products.description1: Every product reflects years of TNO expertise.
products.description2: We are dedicated to delivering internationally trusted solutions for the maritime industry.

cases.title: Projects & Case Studies
cases.description: From ship interiors to retrofit and repair — we deliver results worth being proud of, with precision and expertise.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose TNO?
whyChoose.description: Rooted in Taiwan, reaching globally — we earn the trust of vessel owners through expertise and commitment.

brandCTA.title1: From the Open Ocean to Everyday Life,
brandCTA.description1: Backed by ISO 9001 and multiple international classification society certifications,
brandCTA.description2: we ensure every process is reliable — delivering safe, durable, and high-quality results for the maritime industry.

contactCTA.title1: Contact us today for a customized marine solution
contactCTA.title2: and make every voyage safer and more efficient.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: TNO provides full-scope marine services including material supply, product manufacturing, design planning, and custom fabrication — integrated solutions from concept to delivery.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.description1: Behind every project is a commitment to safety and trust.
hero.description2: TNO delivers end-to-end solutions from design to manufacturing.

intro.description1: Combining design, manufacturing, and processing capabilities with material agency and supply chain advantages,
intro.description2: we provide complete solutions from initial planning through to final delivery.

material.title: Material Supply • Rapid Fulfillment
material.description: We represent a wide range of imported construction materials and raw materials — including thermal insulation, PU foam boards, and engineering timber — ensuring a stable and efficient material supply for your projects.

manufacturing.title: High-Quality Production • Strict Quality Control
manufacturing.description: We manufacture metal partition panels, stainless steel kitchen equipment, and outfitting components in our own factory. Every process is rigorously inspected and controlled to meet international certification standards.

design.title: Tailored Solutions • Precise Execution
design.description: We create custom 2D/3D planning drawings for your project — from requirements analysis to spatial layout — ensuring every detail aligns with real-world operations, whether for ship cabin partitions or stainless steel equipment.

processing.title: Flexible Processing • Versatile Applications
processing.description: We offer a range of metal processing services including CNC turning and milling, bending, welding, and gantry milling — supporting secondary fabrication for marine, industrial, and construction projects.

cta.title: Let's Kick Off Your Project Together

meta.title: Products
meta.description: TNO represents a range of internationally certified marine materials, including thermal insulation, metal partition systems, and marine equipment — reliable quality, professional service.

hero.title: Diverse Marine Materials
hero.description: From certified thermal insulation to complete cabin outfitting systems — we offer comprehensive solutions.

detail.ctaTitle: Want to know how this product can help your project?

meta.title: Case Studies
meta.description: Explore TNO's extensive portfolio of marine renovation projects — including bulk carrier refurbishment, yacht interiors, and offshore platform coating.

hero.title: Case Studies
hero.description1: Every project represents our commitment to quality —
hero.description2: witness the results we create together with our clients.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: TNO Metal was founded in 2016, specializing in ship cabin planning, marine maintenance, metal processing, and stainless steel kitchen manufacturing, certified under ISO 9001:2015 and multiple international classification societies.

hero.title2: Building the Safest and Most Comfortable Ship Cabins
hero.description1: Focused on comprehensive ship cabin planning and construction,
hero.description2: we deliver turnkey services through professional integration and rigorous processes.

team.title: We Are the TNO Team
team.description1: TNO Metal was founded in 2016, specializing in ship cabin planning, marine maintenance, metal processing, and stainless steel kitchen manufacturing.
team.description2: We believe safety is not just a technique — it is a responsibility to people and spaces.
team.description3: From ship cabin partitions to architectural interiors, our core values of
team.description4: "Quality, Safety, and Function" ensure every space combines professional structure with the comfort of home.

belief.label: Our Philosophy
belief.title: Safety as an Extension of Home
belief.description1: We believe safety is not just a technique — it is a responsibility.
belief.description2: Every product and every installation is a direct response to the trust placed in us.
belief.description3: We are committed to integrity, quality, and service as our foundation,
belief.description4: completing every detail with a professional attitude,
belief.description5: making 'safety' not just a standard, but the most reassuring anchor in people's lives.

expertise.label: Our Expertise
expertise.description1: We possess comprehensive ship cabin integration capabilities —
expertise.description2: from planning and design, material supply, and component processing to onboard installation and maintenance,
expertise.description3: providing vessel owners with a complete one-stop professional service.
expertise.description4: With rigorous processes and extensive practical experience,
expertise.description5: we ensure every vessel achieves the ideal balance of safety, comfort, and efficiency.

certification.title: International Certifications & Quality Assurance
certification.description1: We hold multiple international quality and safety certifications, including ISO 9001:2015 and approvals from classification societies worldwide.
certification.description2: Each certificate represents our unwavering commitment to quality and responsibility.
certification.description3: We believe trust comes from expertise, and expertise is continuously validated.
certification.isoCaption: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System Certificate obtained in August 2018
certification.logosAlt: NK, ABS, KR, CR, BV, DNV, CE, CCS, LR, RINA certifications
certification.logosCaption: IMO certificates per international classification society regulations: NK, ABS, KR, CR, BV, DNV, CE, CCS, LR, RINA

meta.title: Contact Us
